## Public-release checklist

- [ ] No personal identity, local path, credential, or private operations material
- [ ] Registration and evidence-tier artifacts regenerated when affected
- [ ] Public census regenerated when counts or definitions changed
- [ ] Contrary, partial, and inconclusive outcomes remain visible
- [ ] Relevant tests and full web build pass
- [ ] Disclosure, review, DOI, and release-signing claims are verifiable
